records.m_Talk_ENG: What did your Master just do?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What did your Master just do?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What did your Master just do?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Something stupid.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Something stupid.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Something stupid.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
That idiot
8v He's gonna collapse again.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
That idiot
8v He's gonna collapse again.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
That idiot
8v He's gonna collapse again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What?

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Cough!*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Cough!*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Cough!*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Once again, you've fed the sword blood.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Once again, you've fed the sword blood.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Once again, you've fed the sword blood.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You know it's killing you. And yet you still let the impulse take over?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You know it's killing you. And yet you still let the impulse take over?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You know it's killing you. And yet you still let the impulse take over?

records.m_Talk_ENG:

8vI had to end it.
records.m_Talk_DEU:

8vI had to end it.
records.m_Talk_FRA:

8vI had to end it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So there'd be no regrets.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So there'd be no regrets.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So there'd be no regrets.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Regret? You've already drowned in it long ago.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Regret? You've already drowned in it long ago.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Regret? You've already drowned in it long ago.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if you got revenge now, your family wouldn't come back.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if you got revenge now, your family wouldn't come back.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if you got revenge now, your family wouldn't come back.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're right.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
It's like grasping
8v sand that slips through your fingers.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
It's like grasping
8v sand that slips through your fingers.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
It's like grasping
8v sand that slips through your fingers.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No one can undo what's already passed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No one can undo what's already passed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No one can undo what's already passed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But you're different. You carry a special bloodline.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But you're different. You carry a special bloodline.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But you're different. You carry a special bloodline.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't waste that gift on something as petty as revenge.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't waste that gift on something as petty as revenge.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't waste that gift on something as petty as revenge.

records.m_Talk_ENG:

8vYou're right. This power can't be wasted. I already know where it needs to go.



records.m_Talk_ENG: You made the right call bringing him to the hospital.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You made the right call bringing him to the hospital.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You made the right call bringing him to the hospital.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The doctor said he wouldn't have recovered properly with just home care.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The doctor said he wouldn't have recovered properly with just home care.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The doctor said he wouldn't have recovered properly with just home care.

records.m_Talk_ENG:

8vYeah.
records.m_Talk_DEU:

8vYeah.
records.m_Talk_FRA:

8vYeah.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You mentioned your master always passed out when using that sword.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You mentioned your master always passed out when using that sword.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You mentioned your master always passed out when using that sword.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But this time it wasn't just passing out. He coughed up so much blood, I thought he was dead.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But this time it wasn't just passing out. He coughed up so much blood, I thought he was dead.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But this time it wasn't just passing out. He coughed up so much blood, I thought he was dead.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We've gotta get rid of that sword.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We've gotta get rid of that sword.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We've gotta get rid of that sword.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then he'd probably spend all day trying to find it again. He needs it if he ever wants to beat Yeonhwa.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then he'd probably spend all day trying to find it again. He needs it if he ever wants to beat Yeonhwa.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then he'd probably spend all day trying to find it again. He needs it if he ever wants to beat Yeonhwa.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That was the first time I saw him so worked up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That was the first time I saw him so worked up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That was the first time I saw him so worked up.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
He's way smarter than me
8v So why would he push himself that far just to take that thing down?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
He's way smarter than me
8v So why would he push himself that far just to take that thing down?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
He's way smarter than me
8v So why would he push himself that far just to take that thing down?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is the hometown Seosaeng left when he was a child, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is the hometown Seosaeng left when he was a child, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is the hometown Seosaeng left when he was a child, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If his path after that led to the Administration, he probably didn't leave for a happy reason.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If his path after that led to the Administration, he probably didn't leave for a happy reason.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If his path after that led to the Administration, he probably didn't leave for a happy reason.
